rationale: Both papers are in WOM, but the cited paper studies brand-level WOM volume antecedents across channels, while the citing paper focuses on causal incentive effects on review-text positivity and enjoyment. The current evidence includes only a single DOI match (no in-text citation context), so it is not clear whether this is merely background or a substantive foundational/comparison use. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop.
